basic_details.job_title: APS Jorhat Teaching & Administrative Staff Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for PGT, TGT and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Army Public School Jorhat (APS Jorhat) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of Teaching & Administrative Staff Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can download the application form from the official website and submit it offline.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate, B.Ed, Graduate, D.El.Ed, CTET/TET, Diploma in Counselling, B.Ed Special Education
qualification.details: PGT Pol Science: Two years Integrated Post Graduate MA/M.Sc. Course of Regional College of Education of NCERT in concerned subject with at least 50% aggregate marks OR Post-Graduation with minimum 50% marks or equivalent grade and three-year integrated B.Ed./M.Ed. OR Master Degree from a recognized University with at least 50% marks in aggregate in the Subject. B.Ed. from a NCTE recognized university/institution with minimum 50% aggregate marks. Proficiency in teaching in English and Hindi. Knowledge of Computer Application. PGT Home Science: Two years Integrated Post Graduate MA/M.Sc. Course of Regional College of Education of NCERT in concerned subject with at least 50% aggregate marks OR Post-Graduation with minimum 50% marks or equivalent grade and three-year integrated B.Ed./M.Ed. OR Master Degree from a recognized University with at least 50% marks in aggregate in the Subject. B.Ed. from a NCTE recognized university/institution with minimum 50% aggregate marks. Proficiency in teaching in English and Hindi. Knowledge of Computer Application. TGT Maths: Four years Integrated Degree Course of Regional College of Education of NCERT in the concerned subject with at least 50% marks in aggregate OR Post-Graduation with a minimum 50% marks or equivalent grade and three-year integrated B.Ed./M.Ed. OR Bachelor Degree with at least 50% marks in the concerned subject/combination of subjects and in aggregate. For TGT (Mathematics): Bachelor degree in Mathematics with any two of the following subjects:- Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Economics, Computer Science, Statistics. B.Ed. from a NCTE recognized university/institution with minimum 50% aggregate marks. Pass in CTET/TET. Proficiency in teaching in English and Hindi medium. Knowledge of Computer Application. TGT Computer: Four years Integrated Degree Course of Regional College of Education of NCERT in the concerned subject with at least 50% marks in aggregate OR Post-Graduation with a minimum 50% marks or equivalent grade and three-year integrated B.Ed./M.Ed. OR Bachelor Degree with at least 50% marks in the concerned subject/combination of subjects and in aggregate. For TGT (Computer Science): BCA or Graduation in Computer Science or BE/B-Tech(Computer Science/IT) or Graduation in any subject and A level course from DOEACC, Min of Info & Communication & Technology, GOI. B.Ed. from a NCTE recognized university/institution with minimum 50% aggregate marks. Pass in CTET/TET. Proficiency in teaching in English and Hindi medium. Knowledge of Computer Application. PRT All subjects: Graduate holding Bachelor's degree with at least minimum 50% marks in aggregate. B.El.Ed./02-year D.El.Ed. OR Teachers who were already in service with Army Public Schools/APPS prior to 11 Aug 2023 with B.Ed degree can also apply/continue subject to enrolment/completion of Bridge Course. Pass in CTET/TET conducted by CBSE/State Govt. Proficiency in teaching in English and Hindi medium. Knowledge of Computer Application. Balvatika Mother Teacher: Graduation with min 50% from recognized Institution/University. Diploma of min 2 years duration in Nursery Teacher Edn/Pre School Education/Early Childhood Education Pgme (D.E.C.Ed) of min two yrs duration or B.Ed (Nursery) from NCTE recog institution. Receptionist: Graduate or ten years of service as a clerk (for Ex-Servicemen). Computer literate. Knowledge of Computer MS Office (Speed 35 W.M.P in English). Basic knowledge of accounting. Excellent verbal and written communication skills to interact with parents, staff, and students. Adm Supervisor: Graduate in case of civilian or fifteen years of service in case of ESM who should be physically fit to undertake strenuous job of running errand. Working knowledge of computers and basic financial matters. Good communication skills in English and Hindi. Minimum 5 years of experience in administration preferably in an academic institution and ability and willingness for liaison work with various Govt./Non-Govt organization. JCO or equivalent. Medically Fit. Preferably an ex-serviceman of General Duties category upto the age of 55 years and should not have any disciplinary case against him in the entire service. Counsellor: Graduation/Post Graduation in Psychology with minimum 50% aggregate marks. Diploma/Certificate in Counselling from a recognized institution. B.Ed. from a NCTE recognized university/institution with minimum 50% aggregate marks. Special Educator: Graduation with B.Ed (Special Education) or B.Ed General with one year diploma in special education. RCI Regn number is mandatory.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.apsjorhat.org.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 07-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the APS Jorhat Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.heading: APS Jorhat Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: PGT Pol Science: Two years Integrated Post Graduate MA/M.Sc. OR Master Degree from a recognized University with at least 50% marks in aggregate in the Subject. B.Ed. from a NCTE recognized university/institution with minimum 50% aggregate marks. OR Master Degree from a recognized University with at least 50% marks in aggregate in the Subject. B.Ed. from a NCTE recognized university/institution with minimum 50% aggregate marks. TGT Maths: Four years Integrated Degree Course of Regional College of Education of NCERT in the concerned subject with at least 50% marks in aggregate OR Post-Graduation with a minimum 50% marks or equivalent grade and three-year integrated B.Ed./M.Ed. OR Bachelor Degree with at least 50% marks in the concerned subject/combination of subjects and in aggregate. For TGT (Mathematics): Bachelor degree in Mathematics with any two of the following subjects:- Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Economics, Computer Science, Statistics. B.Ed. from a NCTE recognized university/institution with minimum 50% aggregate marks. Pass in CTET/TET. Proficiency in teaching in English and Hindi medium. Knowledge of Computer Application. TGT Computer: Four years Integrated Degree Course of Regional College of Education of NCERT in the concerned subject with at least 50% marks in aggregate OR Post-Graduation with a minimum 50% marks or equivalent grade and three-year integrated B.Ed./M.Ed. OR Bachelor Degree with at least 50% marks in the concerned subject/combination of subjects and in aggregate. For TGT (Computer Science): BCA or Graduation in Computer Science or BE/B-Tech(Computer Science/IT) or Graduation in any subject and A level course from DOEACC, Min of Info & Communication & Technology, GOI. B.Ed. from a NCTE recognized university/institution with minimum 50% aggregate marks. Pass in CTET/TET. Proficiency in teaching in English and Hindi medium. Knowledge of Computer Application. PRT All subjects: Graduate holding Bachelor's degree with at least minimum 50% marks in aggregate. B.El.Ed./02-year D.El.Ed. OR Teachers who were already in service with Army Public Schools/APPS prior to 11 Aug 2023 with B.Ed degree can also apply/continue subject to enrolment/completion of Bridge Course. Pass in CTET/TET conducted by CBSE/State Govt. Proficiency in teaching in English and Hindi medium. Knowledge of Computer Application. Balva

content_sections.heading: APS Jorhat Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

rows.event: Last Date for submission of application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.apsjorhat.org. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 07-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for APS Jorhat Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of offline applications for the APS Jorhat Teaching & Administrative Staff posts is 07th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Teaching & Administrative Staff at APS Jorhat?
faq.answer: There are a total of 10 vacancies for various Teaching & Administrative Staff positions at Army Public School Jorhat for the recruitment drive in 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for APS Jorhat Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process for the APS Jorhat Teaching & Administrative Staff positions is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for TGT Maths post?
faq.answer: For the TGT Maths post, candidates need a Bachelor Degree with at least 50% marks in Mathematics and any two of the following subjects: Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Economics, Computer Science, Statistics, along with a B.Ed. degree and CTET/TET qualification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for APS Jorhat Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee for all categories (General/OBC and SC/ST) is Rs. 250/- for the APS Jorhat recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary range for the advertised posts?
faq.answer: The salary for the posts ranges from Rs. 15,000.00 to Rs. 32,928.00 per month, depending on the specific post and its pay scale.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Teaching & Administrative Staff positions at APS Jorhat will primarily involve an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of Army Public School Jorhat, which is www.apsjorhat.org.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any age limit mentioned for the APS Jorhat recruitment?
faq.answer: The specific age limits for the APS Jorhat recruitment are not detailed in the provided summary. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for precise age criteria.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The recruitment for these Teaching & Administrative Staff positions at Army Public School Jorhat is on an Ad-hoc basis.
